summary: A transaction-level analysis of 92 community banks found $78.3 million in net deposits moved to Coinbase over 13 months, with money market accounts losing most outflows.

title: Tightening Bitcoin Bollinger Bands forecast explosive price move, but which way?
summary: The Bollinger Bands indicator has narrowed to its tightest level on record, a rare technical setup that analysts say is a sign of a pending directional move.

title: ProShares seeks stablecoin reserves with GENIUS Act-compliant Treasury ETF
summary: The ETF invests exclusively in short-term US Treasurys and is structured for potential use by stablecoin issuers under US reserve requirements.

title: Ripple CEO confirms White House meeting between crypto, banking reps
summary: Trump administration officials held a similar event last week to discuss stablecoin yield within a market structure bill under consideration in Congress.

title: Bitcoin ETFs still sit on $53B in net inflows despite recent outflows: Bloomberg
summary: Heavy outflows haven’t erased the success of spot Bitcoin ETFs, which still hold $53 billion in cumulative inflows, according to Bloomberg analyst Eric Balchunas.

title: ‘Resilient’ Bitcoin holders defend BTC, but bear floor sits 20% lower: Glassnode
summary: Bitcoin trades in a tight demand zone that formed in 2024, but previous bear market data suggests the channel will break and lead to new lows.

title: Bitcoin 'roadmap to bottom' says $58.7K Binance cost basis now crucial
summary: New Bitcoin price analysis set out key safety nets for bulls ahead of a potential showdown with Binance traders' aggregate deposit cost basis.

title: CME targets May launch for 24/7 crypto derivatives trading
summary: As both the SEC and CFTC explore 24/7 trading hours for US capital markets, several traditional financial exchanges file to expand hours in anticipation of such a move.

title: Bitcoin miners chase 30 GW AI capacity to offset hashprice pressure
summary: Public Bitcoin miners are developing 30 gigawatts of AI-focused power capacity, nearly triple current levels, as post-halving margin pressure reshapes the industry.

title: Bitcoin price forecast sees new breakdown as crypto liquidates over $200M
summary: Bitcoin fed into “extreme bearish sentiment” as a tight BTC price range fueled daily crypto liquidations of over $200 million.

title: Digital Assets Lose $73B Since October 2025 Highs, CoinShares Finds
summary: Short Bitcoin funds attracted $14.5 million in inflows as investors hedge against falling prices.

title: Crypto Funds Just Bled $1.73B – The Biggest Exit Since November 2025
summary: CoinShares found that sentiment hasn't recovered since October 10, 2025, as investors reduced exposure across major cryptocurrencies.
